events.appearance_notes: High activity; A man in white clothes kept walking backwards with his hands raised;.
events.event_text: From 1.5s to 20.2s, a man in white clothes kept walking backwards with his hands raised;.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The other one is chasing the first person, holding a wooden stick in his hand and waving it constantly.
events.event_text: From 1.5s to 20.2s, the other one is chasing the first person, holding a wooden stick in his hand and waving it constantly.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The person being chased backed up to a black car, and the person chasing him turned around and left.
events.event_text: From 20.2s to 30.6s, the person being chased backed up to a black car, and the person chasing him turned around and left.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The person chasing turned around and raised the stick again, and the person being chased turned around and ran away.
events.event_text: From 31.2s to 37.4s, the person chasing turned around and raised the stick again, and the person being chased turned around and ran away.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The person who ratified went to another person, and the other person set a house on fire.
events.event_text: From 38.3s to 40.7s, the person who ratified went to another person, and the other person set a house on fire.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The house was set on fire, and there were many people walking around at the door.
